description: Business taxonomy for TGroup dental clinic management overlay

domains.label: Authentication & Permissions
domains.description: User login, JWT token lifecycle, permission groups, role-based access control, and location scope enforcement.

domains.label: Customer Management
domains.description: Patient records, profiles, search, create/edit/soft-delete, referral tracking, and customer source attribution.

domains.label: Appointment Scheduling
domains.description: Creating, editing, rescheduling, and cancelling appointments with doctor and location assignment.

domains.label: Check-in & Wait Flow
domains.description: Reception workflow from patient arrival through waiting, in-treatment, and completion status transitions.

domains.label: Service Records & Treatment
domains.description: Dental treatment records, multi-visit tracking, service catalog, and appointment-to-service conversion.

domains.label: Payments & Billing
domains.description: Payment collection (cash, bank transfer, VietQR, wallet), outstanding balance tracking, receipts, and payment history.

domains.label: Deposit Wallet
domains.description: Pre-paid deposit top-ups, wallet balances per customer, and wallet deduction against service payments.

domains.label: Monthly Payment Plans
domains.description: Installment plan creation, schedule management, and per-installment payment status tracking for outstanding balances.

domains.label: Employee Management
domains.description: Staff profiles, roles, tiers, schedule availability, referral codes, and linked team relationships.

domains.label: Locations & Branches
domains.description: Clinic branch management, per-branch metrics, global location filter synced across all pages.

domains.label: Service Catalog & Products
domains.description: Dental service definitions, pricing, visit counts, and product inventory available per location.

domains.label: Administration & Settings
domains.description: System preferences, bank account config, IP access control, role definitions, customer sources, and CMS website pages.

journeys.label: User Login
journeys.description: Staff member authenticates and gains scoped access to the clinic management system.
steps: User opens Login.tsx and submits email + password
Frontend POSTs credentials to POST /api/Auth/login
auth.js validates credentials against dbo.aspnetusers, signs JWT with JWT_SECRET
JWT token stored in localStorage via AuthContext
AuthContext hydrates user profile, roles, and effectivePermissions
App.tsx router redirects to Overview dashboard based on role

journeys.label: User Logout
journeys.description: Staff member ends their session and JWT is cleared from the browser.
steps: User clicks logout in sidebar footer
AuthContext.logout() removes JWT from localStorage
LocationContext and AppointmentHoverContext state is reset
Router redirects to /login page

journeys.label: Create Customer
journeys.description: Receptionist registers a new patient with full profile, referral source, and location assignment.
steps: User opens AddCustomerForm modal from Customers page or QuickActionsBar
Form collects name, phone, email, DOB, gender, address, medical history, referral source
useFormValidation validates required fields and phone format
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/Partners with customer=true flag
partners.js inserts into dbo.partners, returns new record
useCustomers refreshes customer list; modal closes with success toast

journeys.label: Edit Customer
journeys.description: Staff updates an existing patient's profile information.
steps: User opens customer row in Customers page, clicks Edit
AddCustomerForm pre-fills with current CustomerFormData
User modifies fields and submits
Frontend PUTs to PUT /api/Partners/:id
partners.js updates dbo.partners record
CustomerProfile and customer list refresh with updated data

journeys.label: Patient Check-in at Reception
journeys.description: Receptionist marks a patient as arrived and tracks their wait time through to treatment.
steps: Receptionist views TodayAppointments on Overview dashboard
Clicks check-in action on patient row in PatientCheckIn component
CheckInFlow transitions status: not-arrived -> arrived -> waiting -> in-treatment -> done
WaitTimer starts live countdown from arrival time
PUT /api/Appointments/:id updates checkInStatus and arrivalTime
Overview dashboard updates zone counts in real time

journeys.label: Create Appointment
journeys.description: Staff books a new appointment by selecting customer, doctor, location, date/time, and service.
steps: User opens AppointmentForm from Calendar, Appointments page, or QuickAddAppointmentButton
Selects customer via CustomerSelector, doctor via DoctorSelector, location via LocationSelector
Chooses date, start/end time from TIME_SLOTS, and service name
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/Appointments
appointments.js inserts into dbo.appointments
Calendar and Appointments list refresh; new card appears in correct time slot

journeys.label: Reschedule Appointment
journeys.description: Staff moves an appointment to a new date/time via drag-and-drop on the calendar or edit form.
steps: User drags AppointmentCard to new time slot in DayView or WeekView
useDragReschedule.handleDrop() calculates new date and time
Frontend PUTs to PUT /api/Appointments/:id with updated date/startTime/endTime
appointments.js updates dbo.appointments record
Calendar re-renders with appointment in new slot

journeys.label: Record Treatment Service
journeys.description: Doctor or staff creates a service record for a patient's dental treatment.
steps: User opens ServiceForm from Services page or via ConvertToService from an appointment
Selects customer, doctor, service catalog item, tooth numbers, and visit count
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/SaleOrders or /api/Services
Backend inserts into dbo.saleorders or dbo.dotkhams
ServiceHistoryList and CustomerProfile refresh
MultiVisitTracker shows progress against total planned visits

journeys.label: Record Payment
journeys.description: Staff records a patient payment against an outstanding service balance.
steps: User opens PaymentForm on Payment page, selects customer
Chooses payment method (cash/bank/VietQR/wallet), enters amount
VietQrModal shown if method is VietQR — displays QR code
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/Payments or /api/AccountPayments
payments.js inserts payment record and updates outstanding balance
PaymentHistory and OutstandingBalance components refresh

journeys.label: Void Payment
journeys.description: Manager reverses an incorrect payment record and restores the outstanding balance.
steps: Manager selects payment in PaymentHistory table, clicks Void
Confirmation dialog shown with payment details
Frontend PUTs to PUT /api/Payments/:id/void
payments.js runs DB transaction: sets status='voided', reverses balance adjustment
OutstandingBalance and PaymentHistory refresh to reflect reversal

journeys.label: Deposit Wallet Top-up
journeys.description: Receptionist adds funds to a customer's pre-paid deposit wallet.
steps: User opens DepositWallet component for a customer on Payment page
Enters top-up amount and payment method
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/AccountPayments with type=topup
accountPayments.js inserts transaction and updates wallet balance
DepositWalletData refreshes showing new balance and transaction history

journeys.label: Create Monthly Payment Plan
journeys.description: Staff sets up an installment plan for a patient with a large outstanding balance.
steps: User opens MonthlyPlanCreator from Payment page, selects customer with outstanding balance
Enters total amount, down payment, number of installments, and start date
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/MonthlyPlans
monthlyPlans.js inserts plan and generates installment schedule records
PaymentSchedule component renders installment timeline
InstallmentTracker shows paid vs upcoming vs overdue per installment

journeys.label: Create Employee
journeys.description: HR or manager registers a new staff member with roles, tier, and location assignment.
steps: User opens EmployeeForm from Employees page
Fills in name, phone, email, roles (RoleMultiSelect), tier (TierSelector), and location
inferRoleFromFlags() maps roles to dbo.partners boolean flags
Frontend POSTs to POST /api/Employees
employees.js inserts into dbo.partners with employee=true and role flags
EmployeeTable refreshes; new staff appears in list

journeys.label: Global Location Filter
journeys.description: Staff scopes the entire dashboard to a single branch by selecting from the location dropdown.
steps: User selects a branch from FilterByLocation dropdown in the header
LocationContext.setSelectedLocationId() updates global state
All 10+ pages re-fetch data with companyId query parameter
API routes filter dbo.* tables by company_id WHERE clause
All lists, calendars, and metrics reflect only the selected branch

journeys.label: Edit Role Permissions
journeys.description: Admin modifies which actions a role group can perform across the system.
steps: Admin navigates to Permissions page (PermissionBoard.tsx)
PermissionMatrix renders role-vs-module grid via usePermissionBoard hook
Admin toggles permission checkboxes for a role
Frontend PUTs to PUT /api/Permissions/employees/:id
permissions.js updates records in dbo.permissions
AuthContext re-evaluates effectivePermissions on next login

journeys.label: Walk-in Patient Registration
journeys.description: Receptionist quickly registers a walk-in patient and creates an appointment in one step.
steps: Receptionist clicks Walk-in button on Overview dashboard
WalkInForm collects minimal patient info (name, phone) and service
Form simultaneously creates customer (POST /api/Partners) and appointment (POST /api/Appointments)
New patient appears in TodayAppointments with 'arrived' check-in status
WaitTimer starts immediately for the walk-in patient
